rows.question: The points $O,$ $A,$ and $B$ satisfy $\overrightarrow{OA} = \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 2 \\ 3 \end{pmatrix}$ and $\overrightarrow{OB} = \begin{pmatrix} -3 \\ -2 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix}.$  Find the area of triangle $OAB.$
